[[Category:Politics]]
[[Category:President Sunday]]
Nomos is a concept used by President Sunday to describe political arrangements<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SBcB6QR_DPI&list=PLV1uK_6Ma4ZfhY3pdK9JT8WnPBd7fII4r&index=22</ref>

It has a similar etymology to [[nomological order]] but I personally don't think Vervaeke knows about Karl Schmitt


This took 20 tries to save and not crash

== See Also ==

* [[Nomological order]]
* [[Nomos of Cryonics]]

== References ==[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
